lessons: Scanning barrel cannot re-export server-only queries — client components import the barrel and hit server-only at bundle time
Fix: wrap query as 'use server' action; export type { T } from server-only is safe (erased at compile time)
@zxing/browser must be dynamically imported in useEffect (not top-level) to avoid SSR issues
lookupJobByPacketToken promoted from query to Server Action so station page (client) can call it
